'''ralate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fucken|fucken]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-l-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fucken|fucken]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ralate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ralate|ralate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ralatesher|ralatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ralatesherĂ«m|ralatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ralatero|ralatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ralateshĂ«|ralateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ralateshĂ«m|ralateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiralatero|gokiralatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiralateshĂ«|gokiralateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiralateshĂ«m|gokiralateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goralankerom|goralankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goralankeshĂ«|goralankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goralankeshĂ«m|goralankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goralankeya|goralankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ralaterom|ralaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ralatemu|ralatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ralateya|ralateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiralaterom|gokiralaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiralatemu|gokiralatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiralateya|gokiralateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ralalate|ralalate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ralalatesher|ralalatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ralalatesherĂ«m|ralalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ralalatero|ralalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ralalateshĂ«|ralalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ralalateshĂ«m|ralalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiralalatero|gokiralalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiralalateshĂ«|gokiralalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiralalateshĂ«m|gokiralalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goralalankerom|goralalankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goralalankeshĂ«|goralalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goralalankeshĂ«m|goralalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goralalankeya|goralalankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ralalaterom|ralalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ralalatemu|ralalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ralalateya|ralalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiralalaterom|gokiralalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiralalatemu|gokiralalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiralalateya|gokiralalateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠlĂŠte|rĂŠlĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠlĂŠtesher|rĂŠlĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠlĂŠtero|rĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠlĂŠtero|gokirĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠlĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠlĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠlĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠlĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠlĂŠterom|rĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠlĂŠtemu|rĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠlĂŠteya|rĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠlĂŠterom|gokirĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠlĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠlĂŠteya|gokirĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:raflafte|raflafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:raflaftesher|raflaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:raflaftesherĂ«m|raflaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:raflaftero|raflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:raflafteshĂ«|raflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:raflafteshĂ«m|raflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiraflaftero|gokiraflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiraflafteshĂ«|gokiraflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiraflafteshĂ«m|gokiraflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goraflafnkerom|goraflafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goraflafnkeshĂ«|goraflafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goraflafnkeshĂ«m|goraflafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goraflafnkeya|goraflafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:raflafterom|raflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:raflaftemu|raflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:raflafteya|raflafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiraflafterom|gokiraflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiraflaftemu|gokiraflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiraflafteya|gokiraflafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
